author: joaobosconff
description: Glances is an open-source system cross-platform monitoring tool. It allows real-time monitoring of various aspects of your system such as CPU, memory, disk, network usage etc.
release_notes:
- v4.5.4 fixes temperature thresholds, negative memory values, Docker container counts through Home Assistant, and LXD container filtering.
- It adds Rockchip MPP monitoring, clamps LXC memory values, and improves single-core Rockchip NPU parsing and device naming.
- Security fixes cover SSRF in the IP plugin, unauthenticated REST API information disclosure, and Cassandra CQL injection.
title: Glances
